⚙️ Enter results

Set each match's winner and final score as games finish — standings update live. When done, Download updated index.html and commit it to your repo (or Copy results data and paste it in). Or just send Dan’s assistant the scores and get a fresh file. Results live in the file, so the whole family sees the same standings.
● Unsaved changes — download or copy to keep them.
